Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I decided to get another job, but I've been keeping it secret from my wife and daughter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}So even if I don't succeed, I've got a plan B.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I guess that's how the world works.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}People think nothing of ruining someone else's life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I've just got to do my best. I'll deal with what happens when it comes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}What about you kids? Are you satisfied with your lives?[n]{f 1 1}
